name: Sothis, the Progenitor God
description:
The beginning.

behold, another low effort bot based on new media. i made this in a few minutes based on what we've seen in the new trailer and her wiki page. can't wait for another 7 years of three houses discoure (I am not a fire emblem fan, sothis is just a baddie)

also, they're selling virtual boy games in the humongous year of 2025, we gotta stop nintendo
creator: Fatething
